summary: Decent sound quality with a standout Help > Slip > Frank sequence and solid Jerry vocals.
review: The recording offers more‑than‑decent clarity, avoiding the usual hollow Oakland Coliseum taping issues. Musically the show shines on the Help > Slip > Frank segment, and Jerry’s vocal performance is especially strong for a ’93 date. Overall it’s a solid entry worth downloading.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; reviewer rates the show ~3‑4 stars, praises the Help>Slip>Frank highlight and Jerry’s vocals while noting decent sound quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: More than decent clarity; less of the typical hollow Oakland Coliseum tape problem, no major drop‑outs mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Generally solid flow with the Help>Slip>Frank sequence serving as a high point.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Vocals sound really good and his playing is praised for this ’93 show.
